text.title: Performance Architecture Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Are all four prerequisites populated (SLOs, baseline, top-3 endpoints, cache topology)?

text.example: SLO p95=200ms / availability=99.9%. Baseline p95=320ms at 300 RPS (over budget). Cache plan: CDN /items list (60s TTL), Redis hot SKUs (10m). Load-test gate: k6 p95 < 200. Scaling triggers: CPU > 70% + p95 > 180ms. Spec ready.
